goal: Persist the identified model name to /app/result.txt and verify the output
summary:
Phase 2 complete. Wrote `GritLM/GritLM-7B` (single line, trailing newline, 17 bytes, no BOM) to /app/result.txt and verified it matches the organization/model_name regex with no extra whitespace or unexpected lines.

Phase output:
- /app/result.txt exists
- Content: `GritLM/GritLM-7B\n`
- Regex `^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+/[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$` matches
- Verified by grep, wc -l (=1), wc -c (=17), and od byte dump

The deliverable for the ferment is complete: the model identifier is persisted at the required path in the required format.

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.
